entry.title: BMW M4 DOMINANCE | Super Car | 8 Panel Split Wall Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Bring high-performance energy to your space with this DOMINANCE 8-Panel Split Wall Set—a bold, modern composition built around a striking neon performance coupe, cinematic road scene, and aggressive typography. The design is split into 8 panels (4 × 2 layout) to create a premium, gallery-style wall look that instantly upgrades any room.

This artwork combines clean automotive aesthetics, street-racing attitude, and minimal yet powerful text elements—perfect for gamers, car lovers, creators, and anyone who likes their wall to feel fast.

What you’ll receive

  • 1 Set = 8 Panels (split design)

  • High-detail print with sharp textures + strong contrast

  • Works best above a desk, gaming setup, studio wall, or garage-themed room

Size options (final trimmed size)

We print on full sheets with a small white margin, then manually trim borders for a clean finish—so the size below is the final set size after trimming:

  • A4 Sheet Set: 32.7 × 23 in

  • A3 Sheet Set: 46 × 33 in

  • 13×19 Sheet Set: 50 × 37 in

Note: Because trimming is manual, final size can vary slightly (±0.5 in).

Installation note: Frames / wall tapes are not included. You can add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy pasting.

entry.title: LANCER LEGACY | Mitsubishi Lancer | CAR SET | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Porsche GT3 –  Premium Art Poster

Unleash pure adrenaline on your wall with this striking Porsche GT3 race edition artwork. Designed with a bold red backdrop and gritty motorsport detailing, this poster captures the raw intensity of track-ready engineering and high-speed dominance.

Featuring the iconic wide-body Porsche GT3, aggressive aero kit, Hankook race tyres, and razor-sharp decals, this piece brings together precision, power, and passion in one electrifying composition. Paired with the quote “Drive it like you stole it,” this artwork embodies fearless energy and unapologetic attitude — making it a fan-favorite for car lovers.

Printed on premium, fade-resistant paper with studio-grade clarity, this poster is built to stand out in bedrooms, gaming setups, garages, man caves, and collector galleries.
entry.s:tag: Drive It Like You Stole It

entry.title: Porsche 911 #02 | GT3 RS | CAR SET | 5 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 399.00 - 549.00 (3 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of Porsche 911 GT3 RS #01 | CAR SET | 5 Piece Set, designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.
